workspace-docs.description: Local documentation MCP server for this Evo Harness workspace.

tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Search key local docs such as README, CLAUDE, and feature matrix files.

resources.name: CLAUDE
resources.description: Root workspace instructions and project guidance.

resources.name: Feature Matrix (zh-CN)
resources.description: Chinese feature matrix for harness capabilities.

prompts.name: triage_workspace_gap
prompts.description: Turn a workspace capability gap into a concrete debugging plan.

workspace-intel.description: Live workspace surface and session inspection helpers.

tools.name: workspace_snapshot
tools.description: Return workspace counts and optional discovered names.

tools.name: search_surface
tools.description: Search commands, skills, agents, plugins, and MCP servers.

resources.name: Workspace Summary
resources.description: Counts for the current workspace surface.

resources.name: Workspace Surface
resources.description: Counts plus discovered names across the ecosystem.

prompts.name: plan_ecosystem_upgrade
prompts.description: Turn current workspace counts and a stated gap into a concrete upgrade plan.

quality-gate.description: Doctor, promotion, and session analytics helpers for release readiness.

tools.name: doctor_report
tools.description: Return the doctor report including ecosystem health checks.

tools.name: session_summary
tools.description: Return session analytics for the current workspace.

resources.name: Doctor Report
resources.description: Doctor report with ecosystem health findings.

prompts.name: release_readiness_brief
prompts.description: Generate a compact release-readiness review brief.

docs-gap.description: Workspace-wide documentation catalog, search, and repair-brief helpers.

tools.name: catalog_docs
tools.description: List visible markdown docs in the current workspace.

tools.name: search_doc_text
tools.description: Search markdown docs by text content.

tools.name: read_doc_excerpt
tools.description: Read a compact excerpt from one workspace document.

resources.name: Docs Catalog
resources.description: Catalog of visible markdown docs in the workspace.

prompts.name: documentation_repair_brief
prompts.description: Turn a documentation gap into a focused repair brief.

session-lab.description: Session, approval, and background-task inspection helpers.

tools.name: pending_approvals
tools.description: Return pending approval requests for the workspace.

tools.name: task_board
tools.description: Return current background task records for the workspace.

tools.name: session_metrics
tools.description: Return session analytics totals and recent summaries.

resources.name: Pending Approvals
resources.description: Pending approval requests for the workspace.

resources.name: Task Board
resources.description: Current task records for the workspace.

prompts.name: stability_followup
prompts.description: Turn recent session evidence into a focused follow-up brief.
